name: example-huashu-luxe-whitespace
title: Luxe Whitespace
description: Quiet-luxury decks with 70%+ whitespace: a warm off-white #FAFAF8 canvas, Inter 200-600 ultra-thin hierarchy, 120px weight-200 floating numerals with gold decimal points, one warm gold (#D4A574) spent only on hairlines and winning comparison bars, and gradient hairline separators (#E0DCD6) on a fixed 1920×1080 canvas. Based on https://github.com/alchaincyf/huashu-design ppt-build, expanded from a single showcase page into a full multi-section deck.

description_i18n.en: Quiet-luxury decks with 70%+ whitespace: a warm off-white #FAFAF8 canvas, Inter 200-600 ultra-thin hierarchy, 120px weight-200 floating numerals with gold decimal points, one warm gold (#D4A574) spent only on hairlines and winning comparison bars, and gradient hairline separators (#E0DCD6) on a fixed 1920×1080 canvas. Based on https://github.com/alchaincyf/huashu-design ppt-build, expanded from a single showcase page into a full multi-section deck.
description_i18n.zh-CN: 奢侈品级 70%+ 留白幻灯片：米白 #FAFAF8 底、Inter 200–600 超细字重层级、120px 超细数字悬浮 + 金色小数点、唯一暖金 #D4A574 只用于发丝线与获胜对比条、渐变发丝线分隔 #E0DCD6，1920×1080 固定画布、零外部 JS 依赖。基于花叔 huashu-design 的 ppt-build 单页范本扩展为完整多章节 deck。

query.en: Create a quiet-luxury {{deckType}} for {{audience}} about {{topic}} with {{slideCount}}, using the Luxe Whitespace system (based on huashu-design ppt-build): a fixed 1920×1080 canvas auto-scaled to the viewport; every page on the single warm off-white #FAFAF8 field with soft-black #2A2A2A ink (never #000, never a dark page); the locked page frame `padding: 64px 96px 48px 96px` with a top chrome row (10px/400/4px-tracking uppercase eyebrow left, 10px/300 source note right) and a bottom section (13px/300 insight line with weight-500 #666 emphasis left, 32px gold hairline + tracked brand text right); Inter 200–600 via one Google Fonts @import as the only family — weight 700+ is forbidden, emphasis steps 300→500. The single accent is warm gold #D4A574, spent only on hairlines, decimal points, units, gold full stops ending headlines, the active slide-dot pill, and winning comparison bars — ≤5 gold touches per page, never on a whole headline or surface. Signature devices on every page: ultra-thin floating numerals (120px weight-200 metrics with -4px tracking up to 240px heroes, gold span.dot decimal at weight 300, 28–56px gold superscript units at 0.8 opacity); 1px gradient hairline separators `linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent, #E0DCD6 50%, transparent)` between columns (never solid full-height borders); gold-vs-grey comparison bars (3px gold #D4A574 subject vs 2px grey #D8D5D0 baselines on #EEECEA tracks, right-aligned 80px labels, values outside the track; wide rows may use a gold→transparent right fade). Draw layouts from the locked enumeration: cover (104px thin headline + gold full stop + 280px ghost year at 5% opacity) / hairline-ruled contents / 240px big-number hero with gold-ruled side column / 2–3-card metrics theater with comparison groups (the upstream master) / full-width channel bars / hairline-separated timeline with 88px year numerals graded ghost→ink / centered quote with vertical gold fade hairline / before-after two-column (ghost vs ink+gold) / 2×2 stats grid with crossed gradient hairlines / thin closing sign-off. 70%+ of every page stays empty — one idea per page, at most 3 metric cards / 4 bar rows / 4 timeline columns; add pages rather than shrink whitespace. No emoji, no images, no shadows on content, no border-radius except the counter pill and bar tracks, no second color, no second font. Build a single self-contained HTML file by copying example.html and replacing content only — keep its design tokens, page chrome, hairline devices, and navigation script (←/→/Space keys, #/N hash routing, click zones, script-built gold dot indicator, counter pill) intact. Use the user's real numbers, never lorem ipsum or invented data; Chinese copy uses 「」 quotes and full-width punctuation; replace all fictional 素白/SOBLANC demo content.
query.zh-CN: 用「奢华留白」体系为 {{audience}} 做一套关于 {{topic}} 的 {{deckType}}（页数 {{slideCount}}）：1920×1080 固定米白 #FAFAF8 画布、70% 以上留白、Inter 200–600 超细字重（禁用 700+）、120–240px 超细数字悬浮 + 金色小数点、唯一暖金 #D4A574 每页最多 5 处（发丝线/小数点/单位/句号/金色对比条）、渐变发丝线分隔 #E0DCD6、金灰对比条系统，版式从封面/目录/巨数/指标剧场/渠道条/时间线/引语/前后对照/指标矩阵/结尾枚举中取用。从 example.html 复制出单文件、只换内容，保留 token、页面框架、发丝线装置和导航脚本；用真实数据、替换全部「素白 SOBLANC」演示内容。完整规格以英文版为准（follow the en query above）。

inputs.name: topic
inputs.label: Topic
inputs.placeholder: 你的主题，例如：2026 品牌年度报告

inputs.name: audience
inputs.label: Audience
inputs.placeholder: 董事会 / 品牌客户 / VIP 会员
